dsl_rule.translation_notes: Signal uses generic 'faster' and 'slower' MA without specific periods. Applied standard 5/20 SMA crossover as a reasonable default for trending strategies. The CONTEXT_DEPENDENT direction generates both long and short signals based on crossover direction. Entry conditions include crossover confirmation plus price position above/below the slower MA. Exit triggered immediately on reversal crossover per 'exit at market on crossover signal'.

backtest_rule.reason: Signal uses generic 'faster' and 'slower' MA without specific periods. Applied standard 5/20 SMA crossover as a reasonable default for trending strategies. The CONTEXT_DEPENDENT direction generates both long and short signals based on crossover direction. Entry conditions include crossover confirmation plus price position above/below the slower MA. Exit triggered immediately on reversal crossover per 'exit at market on crossover signal'.

source_rule_text: Generate buy signals when a faster moving average crosses above a slower moving average; generate sell signals when the faster moving average crosses below the slower moving average.
